prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
Absolutely! Here's a little motivation for you:

Starting any difficult task can sometimes feel like moving a mountain, but remember, mountains are moved one stone at a time. Every step you take towards your goal is a step away from procrastination and hesitation. 

Your strength isn't about the size of your steps, but your unwavering commitment to make them. There's a fire in you that brought you to where you are today, and that same fire has the power to carry you through this task and beyond it.

Remember, the greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall. So whatever happens next, assure yourself of one thing - you'll face it head-on.

You've got this, you always do. Start now, and let your determination fuel every step of the way. Good luck and remember, you're doing your best, and that's all anyone can ask for.
